ActorBinding: OpenAI Agents SDK handoff binds triage_agent to booking_agent scope (openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/agents/)
ActorRoleBinding: CrewAI role Senior Data Researcher scoped to one task (docs.crewai.com/concepts/agents)
ActorCapabilityBinding: MCP tools/list filesystem.read capability scoped to one repo (modelcontextprotocol.io)
SoftwareActor: OpenTelemetry service.name=review-api SoftwareActor not a span (opentelemetry.io semconv/resource)
HumanActor: W3C PROV-O prov:Person human reviewer on HumanReview Activity (w3.org/TR/prov-o/)
UserActor: Anthropic Messages API role=user message sender (docs.anthropic.com)
ModelActor: OpenAI Agents SDK Agent.model gpt-5-nano reference (openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/agents/)
ToolServiceActor: MCP Tool call filesystem.read executed by ToolServiceActor (modelcontextprotocol.io)
ExternalServiceActor: A2A AgentCard referenced remote review service (a2a-protocol.org agent discovery)
RuntimeRole: CrewAI Agent role field defines runtime role (docs.crewai.com/concepts/agents)
ReviewerRole: CrewAI Data Analysis Specialist reviewer role (docs.crewai.com/guides/agents/crafting-effective-agents)
HumanOperatorRole: OpenAI Agents SDK human-in-the-loop approval operator
DeveloperRole: Cursor IDE developer triggers agent session as HumanOperator
RemoteAgentReference: A2A Protocol remote agent card URL reference (a2a-protocol.org)
Model: OpenAI model asset gpt-4o configured in Agents SDK
EmbeddingModel: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small in retriever LangSmith run
RerankerModel: Cohere rerank-v3 LangSmith tool run reranker model
PatchArtifact: GitHub PR unified diff as PatchArtifact (GitHub REST API)
ReportArtifact: A2A Artifact TextPart research report (a2a-protocol.org specification)
GraphArtifact: LangGraph exported state graph JSON (LangGraph reference)
SchemaArtifact: OpenAI function tool JSON Schema (platform.openai.com function calling)
JSONSchemaArtifact: OpenAI function parameters JSON Schema object
RunAttempt: OpenAI Run status=in_progress RunAttempt with started_at (developers.openai.com Assistants deep dive)
RetryActivity: OpenAI Run requires_action then submit_tool_outputs RetryActivity
RuntimeBudget: OpenAI Agents SDK Runner max_turns=10 budget (openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/running_agents/)
TraceContext: OpenTelemetry W3C traceparent TraceId SpanId propagation (opentelemetry.io Trace API)
TraceLink: OpenTelemetry Span Link to distributed retriever sub-trace (opentelemetry.io Trace API)
StateSnapshot: LangGraph graph.get_state StateSnapshot values next checkpoint_id (docs.langchain.com/langgraph/persistence)
StateDiff: LangGraph state update channel diff (LangGraph checkpoint README)
ObservableSummary: Arize Phoenix LLM latency p99 aggregate summary (arize.com/phoenix)
AuditRecord: OpenAI organization audit log export record
AgentTranscript: OpenAI Assistants Thread Messages list as agent transcript (platform.openai.com Threads API)
ObservabilityEvent: OpenTelemetry observability event base; Langfuse observation parent type
TraceEvent: OpenTelemetry Span.add_event tool.output with attributes (opentelemetry.io Trace API)
TelemetryEvent: OpenTelemetry metric export batch event (opentelemetry.io metrics data model)
ReplayEvent: LangGraph time-travel replay to historical checkpoint_id (docs.langchain.com/langgraph/persistence)
CheckpointRestoreEvent: LangGraph resume from checkpoint after interrupt
TraceRetentionPolicy: LangSmith project trace retention 7-day default (langsmith CLI README)
AgentSystem: OpenAI Agents SDK multi-agent triage with handoffs system boundary
SessionLifecycleEvent: OpenAI Agents SDK Session lifecycle event (sessions docs)
SessionResumeEvent: OpenAI Agents SDK resume interrupted run SessionResumeEvent
RuntimeEnvironment: Docker devcontainer plus LangGraph thread runtime environment
Container: Docker container image digest sha256 pins environment (docs.docker.com)
ProcessHandle: docker exec worker process PID (Docker CLI)
